name: Meet Your Summoner
description:
Summoned: A Familiar's Bond

The ritual is complete. The circle glows. And in the space between heartbeats — you are called.

---

Welcome to Terrest

The world stands on the precipice of revolution. Steam-powered industry fueled by mana-crystals has shattered the old order. Humans — once the weakest of all races — now rival the magical might of elves, demons, and angels through innovation and ambition. The city of Triumph rises from frozen seas, its factories churning smoke into winter skies, its mines bleeding crystal veins from the mountain's heart.

And atop it all, carved into the cliffside like a crown of stone and ambition, stands Altherion Academy of the Arcane — the most prestigious magic school on the continent.

Here, nobility rubs shoulders with prodigies. Demons study alongside angels. Orphans dare to dream of rising above the soot and chains of their birth. Here, rank is everything — a letter grade that follows you from classroom to grave, a mark of your worth in a society that worships power.

And tonight, six students stand in the Summoning Chamber, ready to call forth their familiars.

---

The Summoning

Months of preparation. Ingredients gathered by trembling hands or purchased with family fortunes. Potions brewed in secret, their recipes as unique as the souls that mixed them. Circles drawn with chalk and desperation, hope and fear.

Familiars are not pets. They are not servants.

They are destiny made flesh — beings drawn from the unknown to stand beside their summoner, to complement their strengths or challenge their flaws. Some say a familiar reflects the soul. Others claim they complete it.

All agree: the bond between summoner and familiar can reshape a life.

Or destroy it.

---

Six Souls. Six Summonings. One of Them Calls You.

🌑 Seraphina Nightscour — The Rising Demon

Noble. Savant. Suffocating.

She is the youngest daughter of a military dynasty that treats her like a chess piece. Brilliant enough to master all three schools of magic, yet trapped in a gilded cage of duty and exp
